basic_details.short_information: Krishak Bharati Cooperative Limited (KRIBHCO) Apprentices Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website kribhco.net.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Chemical Engineering, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, Diploma in Instrumentation Engineering, Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Diploma in Civil Engineering, Diploma in Computer Engineering, B.Sc. (Chemistry)
qualification.details: Diploma in Chemical Engineering Diploma in Mechanical Engineering Diploma in Instrumentation Engineering Diploma in Electrical Engineering Diploma in Civil Engineering Diploma in Computer Engineering B.Sc. (Chemistry) Candidates should not have undergone or presently undergoing Apprenticeship Training elsewhere.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KRIBHCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KRIBHCO to complete the application.
